# TVTopShelfSectionedItem.ImageShape.poster

**Case**

A poster-shaped image with a 2:3 aspect ratio.

## Declaration

```swift
case poster
```

## Image Shapes

- **TVTopShelfSectionedItem.ImageShape.square**: An image with a 1:1 aspect ratio.
- **TVTopShelfSectionedItem.ImageShape.hdtv**: An image with a 16:9 aspect ratio.

items.description: An image with a 1:1 aspect ratio.

items.description: An image with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
